calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2007 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-18-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Geraldine Armendariz, Esq. for Plaintiff: Liam Meisel, also present.
Ira spratley, Esq. for Defendants: Dennis Seiver and Rita Seivert, not present.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendants settled in the sum of $7,000.00 in exchanged for all liens and a dismissal of the action.
Payment will be made within two weeks.
Matter is placed on the Dismissal Calendar on Sept. 18, 2007 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212.
